subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him whom We found turning towards the Sanctuary of his desire and gazing upon the Praiseworthy Station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن وجدناه مقبلا الی کعبه المقصود و ناظرا الی المقام المحمود اذ
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @knowledge; recognition of God, @praise and encouragement, @words vs deeds, @wisdom [hikmat]
